title: HavenCore's DBC Custom Transformations
description: HavenCore is an add-on to the Dragon Block C mod which provides the ability for you to create, customize, and add your very own transformations to the game!.
body:
HavenCore's DBC Custom Transformations

HavenCore is an add-on to the Dragon Block C mod which provides the ability for you to create, customize, and add your very own transformations to the game! You can have up to 6 different forms with each currently allowing you to set their Multipliers, Drains/Regeneration, Defense, Body Type and Colors, Eye Colors, Aura and Lightning, etc.

How to Install:

Download the mod and it's dependencies. Place them in your mods folder along with your chosen DBC mod versions and you're good to go! If you find yourself crashing on startup make sure you have the GTNHMixins dependency in your mod folder and if you do then rename the dependency gtnhmixins to have "!A" in front of the name. Just like: !Agtnhmixins-2.1.1.jar. The rename is a neat trick to get the dependency to load before the other mods in the mods folder like DBC and HavenCore. ## All Features - Configurable Training Points and Potential Unleashed (Stat Items) through YML config files for simple and easy configuration. - TP and PU Items can be reloaded while the server is running so you don't need to restart when config changes are made. Players can remain connected to allow the best experience. - GUI created Custom Transformations where all of their properties are configured within a visual menu. You can share the config files from your forms with anyone around the community so they can use the Custom Forms you've made. - Stat GUI similar to DBC's Stat Menu so you can see how the Custom Forms or anything HavenCore related affects your player. - Additional Dragon Ball related armor for more variety whether for server economies or player cosmetics. ## Custom Transformation Features **Multipliers** (Range: 0.1 to 1000.0): - Strength - Dexterity - Willpower **Drains/Regeneration** (Range: -100% to 100%): - Ki - Stamina - HP **Defense:** - Flat (Range: 1 to 2147483647) - Percentage (Range: 1 to 100%) **Body Type and Colors:** - Human/Saiyan - Custom Hair Shape, Hair Color, Body Color, Tail Color, Eye Colors. - Namekian - Skin Color, Pads Color, Outline Color, Body Type 1 to 3, Eye Colors. - Arcosian (frieza race) – Armor Color, Skin Color, Crystal Color, Muscle Color, Body Type 1 to 3, Form State (Minimal, 1st Form, 2nd Form, 3rd Form, Base Form, Super Form), Eye Colors. **Aura Shape and Colors:** - Constant Aura (True/False) - Aura Patterns (Example: Base, Gold, Blue, UI) - Aura Colors (Any RGB color) - Aura Speed - Aura Intensity - Size (x, y, z) - Lightning Size - Lightning Intensity **Misc:** - Ki Bar Color - Kaioken Stack (True/False) - Optifine not breaking DBC's player renderer - Fixes DBC Hair and Tail animations for Technic Modpacks **Known Bugs:** - Holding C may cause a flicker of DBC Aura under your Custom Aura. - A Custom Transformation with Arcosian 5th form’s body type will drain your Ki Bar based on your DBC config drain settings. You may counteract this by adding Ki Regeneration to your form. **Future Plans:** - Instant Transforming - Stack with Mystic/Majin/UI/God - Dodge/UI Dodge - Customizable SSJ4, Great Ape, and Giant Namekian ## CONTACT & HELP: The best way to contact us is in the HavenCore Network's Discord server! You can post questions, suggestions, check out the FAQ and contact the developers! ## Discord: [https://discord.gg/pKSQhW69Wf](https://discord.gg/pKSQhW69Wf) ## Developers: Discord - Lord Haven#7473 / lordhaven, drori#4435 / drori | Minecraft - DarkHavenz, Crow_Ghost
